programme.desc: Strangers from opposite sides of the wealth divide travel together on two wildly different holidays. Wealthy rock star Rob and his wife Lydia, a high-end jewellery consultant, travel together to Cyprus with hard-up best friends Shelley and Vicky to experience two wildly different holidays. Shelley and Vicky are 'here for a good time, not a long time', and love cheap getaways to the sun where they can let their hair down, party and hit the karaoke clubs. programme.title: Rich House, Poor House
programme.desc: In a wonderfully heart-warming episode, millionaire parents swap with a single mum. Matt and Danni run their own luxury mattress and bedding business and have created quite a life for their family. Home is a sprawling £1.2m country house. But success has come at a cost. Work dominates Matt's life and he's often up grafting at 4am. Danni hopes living like the other half will help recalibrate their work-life balance. For Katie and her daughters home is a run-down three bed in desperate need of updating, and Katie works four jobs to make ends meet. Katie's fourth job selling pre-loved clothes is the big dream to a better life but it currently only pulls in a few pounds a week. Desperate to expand, will the swap show Katie the way ahead? Exec Prods: Emma Read/David Emerson; Dirs: Darren Green/Ricardo Hawkes; Emporium Productions (S12 Ep5)
Can money buy happiness? Explore Britain's wealth divide as two families swap lifestyles.
